  1. de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTRule

Packages that use SMTRule
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.

  • Uses of SMTRule in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

    Subclasses with type arguments of type SMTRule in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SMTRuleApp
    The rule application that is used when a goal is closed by means of an SMT solver.
